generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former defense analyst, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy strengthens our national security. The recent cyberattacks on critical infrastructure prove we can't rely solely on allies. Investing in our own capabilities isn't just about defense—it's about ensuring our civil liberties aren't compromised by foreign interference. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
